get.description:
Semantic search endpoint

Flow:
1. Generate embedding for query
2. Search vector store
3. Return similar messages
Monitor queue health for scaling decisions
Get monitoring statistics for a project's interviews

post.description: Route to exit the interview and deletes the cookies.
Validate the current token and issue a new one if valid.

Proxy all /api/aws/ec2/* requests to the EC2 manager proxy server.
This allows admin users to control EC2 instances from the main app.

BackgroundInfoOptions-Input.title: BackgroundInfoOptions
BackgroundInfoOptions-Input.description: Dataclass representing the possible values for the background info of the synthetic agents

BackgroundInfoOptions-Output.title: BackgroundInfoOptions
BackgroundInfoOptions-Output.description: Dataclass representing the possible values for the background info of the synthetic agents

combine_next.title: Combine Next
combine_next.description: Operator to combine this condition's result with the next. None for the last condition.

Condition.title: Condition
Condition.description: Create a condition that must be met to ask a question

trigger_value.title: Trigger Value
trigger_value.description: The pattern to match or value to compare against

comparison_operator.title: Comparison Operator
comparison_operator.description: Comparison operator. '==' for pattern matching, others for numeric/date comparison.

combine_next.title: Combine Next
combine_next.description: Operator to combine this evaluation's result with the next. None for the last evaluation.

ConditionEvaluation.title: ConditionEvaluation
ConditionEvaluation.description:
A single evaluation check with an optional operator to combine with the next evaluation.

For "A AND B OR C", create:
    [
        ConditionEvaluation(trigger_value="A", combine_next="AND"),
        ConditionEvaluation(trigger_value="B", combine_next="OR"),
        ConditionEvaluation(trigger_value="C"),
    ]

For numeric comparisons (e.g., age >= 18):
    ConditionEvaluation(trigger_value="18", comparison_operator=">=")

ContextType.title: ContextType
ContextType.description: Context to be upsed for probing

DailyInterviewCount.title: DailyInterviewCount
DailyInterviewCount.description: Count of interviews created per day.

DropoutPoint.title: DropoutPoint
DropoutPoint.description: Count of dropouts at a specific question.

ExperimentProjectCreate.title: ExperimentProjectCreate
ExperimentProjectCreate.description: Input model for adding a project to an experiment.

HistogramBucket.title: HistogramBucket
HistogramBucket.description: A value-count pair for histogram use.

Image.description: An image to show the interviewee

primer.description: A primer to show the interviewee before showing the image

description.description: A description of the image used to guide the probing
description.title: Description

alt.description: The alt text for the image for accessibility

Image.title: Image

with_consent.title: With Consent
with_consent.description: Whether to ask for consent before starting the interview

with_welcome.title: With Welcome
with_welcome.description: Whether to show a welcome message before starting the interview

with_audio.title: With Audio
with_audio.description: Allows the respondents to record their answers as audio messages which are transcribed before send as answers to the AInterviewer.

referer_id_key.title: Referer Id Key
referer_id_key.description: Key for the value of the id sent in the referer header

framing.title: Framing
framing.description: A description of the interview and its purpose. Only used by the model.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.description: An introduction to the interview. Displayed to the interviewee as the first message. They whon't be able to respond to this message.

question_sections.title: Question Sections
question_sections.description: A list of sections containing questions to ask the interviewee

outro.title: Outro
outro.description: An outro message for the interview. Displayed to the interviewee as the last message they will see. They will not be able to answer this message.

timed_messages.title: Timed Messages
timed_messages.description: Messages that are displayed to the interviewee after a certain amount of time

MonitoringStats.title: MonitoringStats

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of the question, may be used to reformulate the question and improve the relevance of the probes.

main_question.title: Main Question
main_question.description: The question to ask the interviewee

alternative_main_questions.title: Alternative Main Questions
alternative_main_questions.description: List of alternative formulations of the main question, will be chosen at random.

probes.title: Probes
probes.description: A list of possible follow-up questions to ask after the main question

max_probes_time.title: Max Probes Time
max_probes_time.description: Max time to spend on probing, in seconds

can_answer.title: Can Answer
can_answer.description: Should the user be able to answer the question? Disable this to make the question into a message

exclude_from_history.title: Exclude From History
exclude_from_history.description: Exclude from the interview history. This means that the model will not use this question or the response as a context when it asks further questions.

check_if_answered.title: Check If Answered
check_if_answered.description: Check if the question has already been answered under a previous question

check_if_exhausted.title: Check If Exhausted
check_if_exhausted.description: During the probing, check if the question has been exhausted and the model should continue to the next question.

can_skip.title: Can Skip
can_skip.description: Should the user be able to skip the question?

create_segue.title: Create Segue
create_segue.description: Create a segue from the previous question, to possibly improve the flow of the interview.

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Variables that can be used in the question, ie. uuid. In case they are supplied, they will be filled in before the question is asked. The question should be formatted with Jinja2 style templating.

user_image.title: User Image
user_image.description: Whether the user should be able to upload an image as a response

Question-Input.description: A question that can be asked to the interviewee

Reference.title: Reference
Reference.description:
Create a reference to a previous answer, useful when refering back to a
previous answer, eg. an answer to a survey item. If used, the main question
must contains an empty `{}` as a placeholder for the referred answer.

time.title: Time
time.description: The time in seconds to wait before displaying the message

include_in_history.title: Include In History
include_in_history.description: Should the message be included in the interview history?

as_modal.title: As Modal
as_modal.description: Should the message be shown as a modal? Defaults to False meaning it will be shown as a normal message.

TimedMessage.description: A message that is displayed to the interviewee after a certain amount of time
